popularStory.headline: Jean de Montmirail, also called Jean or Jehan de Montmirel (1165-29 September 1217)
popularStory.description:
Jean de Montmirail, also called Jean or Jehan de Montmirel (1165-29 September 1217) is a French knight, Baron de Montmirail.

He is also lord of La Ferte-Gaucher and Bellot; lord of Oisy, Crèvecœur, B …

sourceList.title: Jean I De Montmirail, "Find A Grave Index"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Montmirail於1165年出生在法國德 艾斯特芒內蒙特米拉爾時，他的父親Andre de Montmirail40歲，母親Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy35歲。他於1184年與Helvide de Dampierre結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年9月29日在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯隆朋特享年52歲，埋葬在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯隆朋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Montmirail于1165年出生在法国德 艾斯特芒內蒙特米拉爾时，他的父亲Andre de Montmirail40岁，母亲Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy35岁。他于1184年与Helvide de Dampierre结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年9月29日在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯隆朋特享年52岁，埋葬在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯隆朋特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Montmirail was born in 1165, in Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, France, his father, Andre de Montmirail, was 40 and his mother, Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy, was 35. He married Helvide de Dampierre in 1184. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 September 1217, in Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Montmirail est né en 1165, à Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, France, son père, Andre de Montmirail, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Helvide de Dampierre en 1184. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1217, à Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Montmirail 1165 in Montmirail, Marne, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andre de Montmirail 40 und seine Mutter Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy 35. Er hat 1184 Helvide de Dampierre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1217 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Montmirail è nato il nel 1165 nel Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Andre de Montmirail, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Helvide de Dampierre nel 1184. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1217, nel Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.

ja.Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, France: フランスグランド エストマルンモントミーレイル
ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Montmirailが1165年にフランスグランド エストマルンモントミーレイルで生まれた時，父Andre de Montmirailは40歳，母Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisyは35歳であった。1184年にHelvide de Dampierreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年9月29日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンロングプオントで52歳で死去し，フランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンロングプオントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Montmirail(이)가 1165년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 마니 몽미레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andre de Montmirail(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1184년 Helvide de Dampierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 9월 29일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 론그폰트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 론그폰트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Montmirail nasceu em 1165, em Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Andre de Montmirail, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Helvide de Dampierre em 1184. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1217, em Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Montmirail родился в 1165 г. в местности монтмиреил, марн, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Andre de Montmirail было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Helvide de Dampierre в 1184 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1217 г. в местности лонгпонт, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгпонт, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Montmirail nació en 1165, en Montmirail, Marne, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Andre de Montmirail, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Hildiarde de Meaux d'Oisy, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Helvide de Dampierre en 1184. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1217, en Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Longpont, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia.
